message:
test(engine): add capability witness test suite and expand attestation
handshake and hash tiers integration tests

New test file:
- capability_witness.rs (2172 lines): comprehensive capability witness
  verification suite covering witness generation, verification
  round-trips, tamper detection, capability subset/superset proofs,
  and deterministic witness ordering

Expanded test files:
- attestation_handshake_integration.rs (+208 lines): additional
  handshake protocol scenarios including multi-round attestation,
  timeout handling, and evidence chain validation
- hash_tiers_integration.rs (+205 lines): expanded tier-based hash
  computation tests covering tier promotion/demotion, cross-tier
  comparison, and deterministic hash stability

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
